note: Self-improving loop: improve multicolor pipeline for 20-30 color images; target hw_forest_cat quality.

tried.result: bit-identical (no pairs in [2,4) ΔE); mt=4 is the effective floor

forest_cat_renders.note: unchanged vs mt=8 — forest cat has no ΔE cluster pairs in the [4,8] merge range

observations: mergeThreshold is the dominant knob for synthetic quality. 8 (default) was too aggressive; 4 preserves genuine cluster distinctions while still merging noise-duplicates. Below 4 is the floor (no pairs closer than ΔE=4 exist in the over-clustered output).
n30_clean went from 0.104 → 0.025 (-76%), comfortably past the 15% exit threshold.
n30_noisy essentially unchanged — mergeThreshold doesn't help when clusters are genuinely wrong from noise-induced k-means drift.

Forest cat unaffected by mergeThreshold change (same 8273 paths, 30 unique fills, bit-identical SVG). Forest cat's cluster centers aren't within the [4, 8] ΔE gap — it's well-separated enough that the narrower merge window doesn't change its behavior.

Exit criterion: n30_clean ≥15% drop ✓ ACHIEVED (-76%). Forest cat visibly more distinct colors ✗ NOT achieved — forest cat's ceiling under this pipeline is reached; further gains require algorithmic changes (per-image k, salient quantization, etc.).
exit_status: Half-satisfied: synthetic exit met; forest-cat exit not met. Recommend stopping parameter tuning (mergeThreshold=4 is the new kept default) and opening a slice for forest-cat-specific improvement.
